gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Our automated bot just watered the plants and updated the health metrics for all community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics and health checks in the APPS.md registry.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date with the latest health statuses and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot with a monitor head holding a clipboard, checking on pixelated code-plants in a greenhouse. The bee mascot is watering a nearby plant.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head holding a tiny clipboard, inspecting glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The bee mascot hovers nearby with a tiny watering can. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
